mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_note (user_id, topic_id, title, description, storage_type, status, missing_info_mask, missing_count, md_file_size) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{storageType}, #{status}, #{missingInfoMask}, #{missingCount}, #{mdFileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, t.title FROM biz_note n LEFT JOIN biz_topic t ON t.id = n.topic_id WHERE n.id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, title, description, storage_type, status, missing_info_mask, missing_count, md_file_size, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT m.note_id AS id, m.note_title AS title, m.is_cross_user AS isCrossUser, n.status AS status, m.create_time AS createTime FROM biz_note_image_mapping m LEFT JOIN biz_note n ON n.id = m.note_id WHERE m.image_id = #{imageId} AND m.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_note SET status = 8 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.*, t.title FROM biz_note n LEFT JOIN biz_topic t ON t.id = n.topic_id
n.status != 8 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR n.status = 6) AND n.topic_id = #{topicId} AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE biz_note SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE biz_note SET missing_info_mask = #{missingInfoMask}, missing_count = #{missingCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_note SET missing_count = #{missingCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_note SET status = #{status}, missing_info_mask = #{missingInfoMask}, missing_count = #{missingCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
